title: Compliance
subtitle: Compliance posture, data subject rights, and legal holds.

dashboard.title: Compliance Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage GDPR, SOC 2, and ISO 27001 compliance posture, handle data subject requests, and create legal holds — all from one place.

frameworkTracking.label: Framework tracking
frameworkTracking.description: Monitor GDPR, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and HIPAA control pass rates in real time.

dataSubjectRequests.label: Data subject requests
dataSubjectRequests.description: Receive and action access, erasure, portability, and rectification requests.

legalHolds.label: Legal holds
legalHolds.description: Freeze tickets and data for litigation or audits and release them when resolved.

automatedChecks.label: Automated compliance checks
automatedChecks.description: Nightly scans surface encryption, MFA, session, and data-mapping gaps.

auditReports.label: Audit-ready reports
auditReports.description: Export a full compliance report for auditors with one click.
